display.purpose: Route H1s and decisive brand claims only.

headline.purpose: Section titles and signature proof panels.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, direct explanations, and service descriptions.

label.purpose: Route prompts, metadata, chips, controls, and form labels.

shadows.name: panel-depth
shadows.purpose: Major cards, sticky header, contact panels, credibility panels, and command decks.

shadows.name: terminal-depth
shadows.purpose: Boot terminal and dense console modules.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focused inputs and compact active elements.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Button, link, nav, and input state changes.

motion.name: shell-sweep
motion.purpose: Slow diagnostic scan sweeps across page shells and panels.

motion.name: marker-pulse
motion.purpose: Low-amplitude pulse for verification rings and active markers.

components.name: Primary Command Button
components.description: Main action button for direct routes and proof panels.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 3.2rem; padding: 0.85rem 1.15rem; border: 1px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.22); border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(115, 255, 190, 0.16), rgba(221, 255, 139, 0.18)); color: #f6fff8; font-family: Fira Code, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 0.76rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: transform 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.32); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.16); }

components.name: Secondary Route Button
components.description: Quiet secondary route for navigation-adjacent actions.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 3.2rem; padding: 0.85rem 1.15rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); color: rgba(228, 246, 236, 0.84); font-family: Fira Code, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 0.76rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: transform 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-button-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); color: #f6fff8; border-color: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.22); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.16); }

components.name: Terminal Card
components.description: Default structural panel for services, proof, notes, and command content.
components.html:
active module

Architecture

Expose weak points before scale turns them into cost.
components.css: .ds-terminal-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; isolation: isolate; display: grid; gap: 0.8rem; padding: 1.35rem; border: 1px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.12); border-radius: 1.5rem; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10, 18, 17, 0.9), rgba(5, 11, 11, 0.96)), radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.05), transparent 40%); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04), 0 1.5rem 3rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); color: #f4fff8; } .ds-terminal-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03), transparent 14%), repeating-linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.04), rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.04) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 4px); opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; } .ds-terminal-card > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-card-label { color: #8ddfba; font: 400 0.74rem/1.2 Fira Code, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card-title { color: #f4fff8; font: 400 1.1rem/1.45 Fira Code, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card-text { color: rgba(214, 236, 225, 0.78); font: 400 1rem/1.75 Fira Code, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; }

components.name: Terminal Input
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 0.45rem; color: #f4fff8; font-family: Fira Code, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; } .ds-field-label { color: #8ddfba; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-terminal-input { width: 100%; min-height: 7rem; padding: 0.85rem 0.95rem; border: 1px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.12); border-radius: 1rem; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(11, 22, 20, 0.92), rgba(4, 11, 10, 0.98)), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02); color: #f4fff8; font: inherit; caret-color: #7effc6; resize: vertical; } .ds-terminal-input::placeholder { color: rgba(173, 206, 189, 0.48); } .ds-terminal-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.36); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.16); }

components.name: Navigation Pill
components.description: Primary nav item with active state.
components.html: ServicesContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; font-family: Fira Code, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 0.45rem 0.7rem; border-radius: 999px; color: rgba(227, 245, 236, 0.8); font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #f5fff8; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.16); } .ds-nav-link-active { background: rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.1); color: #f5fff8; }

components.name: Signal Chip
components.description: Small metadata chip for status, tags, and route hints.
components.css: .ds-signal-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 2.1rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.8rem; border: 1px solid rgba(126, 255, 203, 0.12); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); color: rgba(226, 247, 236, 0.82); font: 400 0.75rem/1.2 Fira Code, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; }

narrative.overview:
This system should feel like a live diagnostic surface for a one-person technical operator: dark, concentrated, direct, and built around signal quality. The interface is a brand surface, but it behaves like a working instrument panel. It shows capability, routing, process, and contact without pretending to be a large anonymous agency.

The current identity is terminal-grade: near-black teal depth, mint linework, acid-lime command accents, dense mono labels, and controlled scanning motion. Improvements should preserve that identity while making each screen easier to read, route, and trust. Visual drama is allowed when it reinforces diagnosis, evidence, or controlled execution.

The system explicitly rejects generic agency polish, bloated SaaS landing-page patterns, vague innovation language, decorative case-study theater, and portfolio design that feels more interested in presentation than problem solving.
keyCharacteristics: Dark teal-black operating surface with mint diagnostic linework.
Mono-forward body voice with Space Grotesk reserved for large display moments.
Dense but orderly modules, with direct routes and evidence-bearing panels.
Motion that reads as scanning, loading, or routing, not decoration.
One-person accountability: direct labels, direct contact, no corporate abstraction.

rules.name: The Mint Wire Rule
rules.body: Mint borders stay thin and structural. Use 1px strokes, glow rings, and subtle overlays; do not use thick side stripes as decoration.

rules.name: The Command Accent Rule
rules.body: Lime is for system output and command emphasis. Keep it rare enough that a visitor can instantly identify it as an active signal.

rules.name: The Black Surface Rule
rules.body: Do not drift into generic navy, purple SaaS gradients, or beige editorial restraint. The brand lives in black-green runtime space.

rules.name: The Operator Voice Rule
rules.body: Mono is legitimate here because the brand is technical and diagnostic. Use it for the working surface, but reserve Space Grotesk for decisive hierarchy so the site does not become a costume terminal.

rules.name: The Tight Display Rule
rules.body: Display letter spacing stops at -0.04em. Do not tighten further; the current brand already uses the maximum safe compression.

rules.name: The Instrument Panel Rule
rules.body: Shadows must support layered instrumentation. If an element looks like a floating SaaS card, reduce the shadow or replace it with a border, scanline, or tonal shift.

rules.name: The Blur With Purpose Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur belongs on terminal panels and sticky chrome. Do not introduce decorative glass panels where no system layer is being implied.

dos: Do preserve the terminal-grade identity: black-green surfaces, mint wire borders, lime command accents, and operator-style labels.
Do connect technical choices to business value in copy and hierarchy.
Do keep direct contact and direct accountability visible because the one-person operator model is part of the trust signal.
Do use real partner marks and credibility proof as evidence-bearing visual elements.
Do keep reduced-motion fallbacks for boot, scramble, sweep, pulse, and scan animations.
Do verify contrast whenever muted phosphor text sits on dark tinted panels.
donts: Don't use bloated SaaS landing-page patterns.
Don't make the portfolio design feel more interested in presentation than problem solving.
Don't make the site feel like a large anonymous consultancy.
Don't use thick colored side-stripe borders, gradient text, or repeated decorative card grids.
Don't turn every section label into a repeated tiny uppercase eyebrow pattern unless it is serving the terminal route language already present in the site.
